payload.tactic: rewrite hc /=; have hD: (DH.G.g ^ z1 * DH.G.g ^ w ^ z2) ^ u = DH.G.g ^ u ^ z1 * DH.G.g ^ w ^ u ^ z2; first by rewrite log_bij !(logg1, logrzM, logDr); ring. rewrite -hD log_bij !(logg1, logrzM, logDr) -expN !(logg1, logrzM, logDr); ring.
